positive: A stylized, highly contrasting illustration of a roaring, mythical lion juxtaposed with geometric floral elements and abstract celestial bodies. The lion should be rendered with strong black outlines and bold, solid color blocking (deep indigo, burnt orange, and antique gold accents). The composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, forming a cohesive emblem design suitable for a chest print on apparel. Utilize a woodcut engraving and Art Deco poster style fusion, ensuring clean, crisp silhouettes and high legibility when scaled. The background should be limited to complementary negative space, emphasizing the main motifs. High contrast, graphic novel quality, vector art look.
negative: low resolution, blurry, cropped, deformed, text, logo, watermark, signature, grainy, artifacts, noisy, poor anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, abstract lines, messy, photographic
